name: Marinated Cucumber
recipeIngredient: (I also add a little fresh garlic)
recipeInstructions:
1. Score cucumbers with tines of fork.
2. Cut into very thin slices.
3. Sprinkle with salt.
4. Chill 2 hours; drain well.
5. Sprinkle with sugar replacement.
6. Add vinegar and pepper.
7. Marinate for 30 minutes or more before serving.
Food Exchange per serving: NEGLIGIBLE CALORIES, NEGLIGIBLE
